title: 埃及十字架之谜
source_file: data\raw\detectiveqa\novel_data_en\27-埃及十字架之谜-埃勒里奎因.txt
summary:
Isaac, Eleanor, and District Attorney Isam reach the mountain hut and confront the man known as Old Pete. After Isam presents a note regarding the murder of Tomasov, the man’s demeanor shifts from that of a cataract-stricken mountain man to a well-educated individual. He removes a beard, a white wig, and face paint, revealing himself to be Andrew Tewell (formerly Andrew Gaetzel), a tall and muscular man. Tewell explains that he, Stephen, and Tomislav were brothers. He expresses intense fear regarding a "terrible ghost" and suspects Krossak of being responsible for the murders.

Initially suspicious of the visitors, Tewell refuses to speak until he sees his brother, Stephen. To facilitate travel and alleviate Tewell's fears, Isam provides him with a package containing a complete police uniform, shoes, and a loaded gun. Tewell dons the uniform, which fits well due to Megala's measurements, and the group departs the hut, moving through the twilight forest toward a clearing where DuSchenberg is waiting.

Meanwhile, in Bradwood, the mysterious journey of Vawn and Stephen becomes a subject of community gossip. Later, as Ellery and Isam travel through South Pennsylvania toward Arroyo, a procession of motorcyclists and police cars arrives in Bradwood. Inspector Vance and a grim-faced Megala appear; Megala is escorted to his yacht, the *Helen*, from which he departs accompanied by a police boat.
